reason: Backend quality checklist and affected layer audit.
Review model/migration/session correctness and SQLite/PostgreSQL parity.
Review deferred, partial, and unexpected worker failure behavior.
Run focused/full tests and preserve non-network diagnostics.
Verify TaskRun results are bounded and secret-safe.
Verify exact-date watermark without changing 95/90/80 thresholds.
Verify immutable generation, lineage, and public API boundaries.
Verify maturation, benchmark, idempotency, and lineage behavior.
Check shared predicates/constants and all registry/config consumers.
Trace watermark and lineage through DB, services, worker, and TaskRun.
Cross-check implementation against researched operational risks.
Confirm no unnecessary frontend surface and existing UI compatibility.
Review due selection priority, boundedness, and no-op avoidance.
